allow: Bash(python -c "from database import init_db; init_db\(\); print\('init_db OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('paper_maker.db'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); print\('questions cols:', [r[1] for r in cur.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(questions\)'\).fetchall\(\)]\); print\('tables:', [r[0] for r in cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).fetchall\(\)]\)")
